title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・どうして？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio loses against Mejiro McQueen, who
declares that no matter how many times they
race, Teio will never win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to prove herself, Tokai Teio decides to
race in the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days later, Tokai Teio is training with all
her might when Symboli Rudolf offers her some
critical remarks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells Teio that there is a big difference
between her and McQueen. No matter how many
times they race, Teio will never beat her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rudolf's statement throws Teio and her efforts to
work toward the Japan Cup into a tailspin.
